title: Command Cockpit Quest Field Board
summary: Turned the Command Cockpit Overview current-run module into a more game-like quest field with route cells for world, level, checkpoint, gate, and next move.
proof: Added questFieldCells and renderQuestFieldCell so the existing quest data renders as a visual route board.
Placed the quest field in the Command Cockpit Overview command row and hid the taller next/gate report cards there.
Added route runner, sweep, and cell wake animations while keeping the mobile version compact and horizontally contained.
